title: iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max launching this year: Expected price, specs and more

snippet: Choosing between Intel Core i5 and AMD Ryzen 5 laptops under  ₹60000? These options from top sellig brands like HP, Dell, Lenovo and more offer reliable performance.

title: Poco X8 Pro, Poco X8 Pro confirmed to launch in India on 17 March: Expected price, specs and more
snippet: Poco is set to launch the Poco X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max 5G in India on March 17. Both mid-range gaming phones are likelyto feature MediaTek Dimensity processors with massive batteries and AMOLED display.

title: Samsung Galaxy M17e 5G full specifications revealed ahead of 17 March India launch: here's what to expect
snippet: Samsung has unveiled the Galaxy M17e 5G, featuring a dual rear camera, 8MP front camera, 6000mAh battery and a 6.7-inch HD+ display. The phone will debut on 17 March and is expected to come in the sub- ₹20,000 price bracket.

title: Researchers warn AI models can successfully match anonymous internet users to their real identities
snippet: A study warns that generative AI has made it easier for hackers to reveal the identities of anonymous social media users. Researchers found that AI can match online profiles to real identities using harmless information shared on social media platforms.

title: Apple could expand 'Ultra' tier with an OLED MacBook and high-end iPhone: Here's what to expect
snippet: Apple could launch three new Ultra products this year including a foldable iPhone, advanced AirPods, and a premium MacBook with a touch-enabled OLED display.

title: Happy International Women's Day 2026: Top 10 AI prompts to make cinematic photos on ChatGPT, Nano Banana, Grok, others
snippet: International Women's Day has been celebrated around the world on 8 March every year since 1911. This year, the theme for International Women's Day, as per the UN, is ‘Rights. Justice. Action. For ALL Women and Girls’, and we've brought you some AI prompts to generate images to mark the occasion.

title: Samsung Galaxy A36, A56 specifications leaked ahead of launch, price range tipped
snippet: Samsung's Galaxy A37 and A57 could launch soon and could feature a triple rear camera setup and 6.7-inch displays. The A37 could be 7.4mm thick, while the A57 could be slimmer at 6.9mm.&nbsp;

title: Nothing Phone 4a vs Motorola Edge 70 Fusion: India price, specs, battery and more compared
snippet: Motorola and Nothing compete in the mid-range segment with their new phones. The Motorola Edge 70 Fusion offers better battery life, durability, and display, while the Nothing Phone 4a focuses on design and camera versatility.&nbsp;

title: Realme C83 5G with 7,000mAh battery and Dimensity 6300 SoC launched in india, price starts at  ₹13,499
snippet: Realme C83 5G is launched in India featuring a 7000mAh battery, 6.7-inch LCD display, and MediaTek Dimensity 6300 processor. The phone starts at a price of  ₹13,499.

title: Sebi settles cases with 29 venture capital funds
snippet: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has resolved cases with 29 venture capital funds. These funds faced allegations of violating securities laws. They have agreed to pay a total of approximately '2 crore. The settlements address non-compliance with older rules regarding venture capital funds.
